text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, during a break from team training...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Howdy, Trainer! I've got a li'l request for ya.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I love, love, love the pants off of this team!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That's why I was hopin' we could snap a picture of
us all together and send it to my family!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm just sure they'll love seein' me an' my team
together!
choice_data_list:
Would you like me to take a photo for you,
then?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: No, no! You need to be in it too!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
We can use the timer on my phone camera! That
way we can all be in it.
choice_data_list: Are you sure you want me in the shot?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Howdy-do, I am! It's not a team photo without
you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So we set about getting ready for an impromptu
photo shoot.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hmm, it's a little uneven here but...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Do your best, li'l smartphone! It's just ten
seconds!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Okay, gather 'round, people! Big smiles! Here it
goes!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Three, two...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clunk!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yikes! My phone's gone and done a dive!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Click!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... It's probably just snapped a blurry picture
of the sky...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: ...Oh? Ahaha!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Lookie here, Trainer! I got a great snap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Displayed on the screen is Taiki Shuttle dashing
toward her phone with her hand outstretched and
the team laughing behind her. It's a wonderful
shot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm sure we'll all look back fondly on this moment.
